schedule_note: Every Monday 09:30 China time. GitHub Actions cron uses UTC: 01:30 every Monday.
focus: AI cowork / buddy / copilot products, excluding WorkBuddy self-updates unless materially relevant
coding agents and developer cowork tools
financial AI agents and investment workflow tools
ByteDance, Alibaba, DingTalk, Feishu and other China workflow entrants

queries.name: AI cowork and enterprise agents
queries.query: (AI agent OR AI copilot OR AI assistant OR cowork OR buddy) enterprise workflow product launch -WorkBuddy

queries.name: office and collaboration agents
queries.query: (Microsoft Copilot OR Google Gemini OR Slack AI OR Notion AI OR DingTalk OR Feishu) agent workflow office

queries.name: coding agents
queries.query: (Cursor OR Claude Code OR GitHub Copilot OR coding agent) product update enterprise

queries.name: financial AI agents
queries.query: (AI agent OR copilot) finance investment banking wealth management product

queries.name: China AI cowork products
queries.query: (ByteDance OR Alibaba OR DingTalk OR Feishu OR Tencent) AI agent assistant cowork buddy
